items.example: Social media platforms use algorithms to decide what content to show you.
The algorithm processes vast amounts of data to make accurate predictions.
The computer can process millions of calculations per second.
The input for the program is a set of user preferences.
The output of the algorithm was a list of recommended products.
She wrote a program that can translate text into multiple languages.
The developers spent hours debugging the code.
Machine learning models can predict consumer behaviour with high accuracy.
The system needs to compute the shortest route between two locations.
Data scientists analyse trends to help businesses make better decisions.
